narrative:
Madison Township A (precinct in Licking County) has 1,375 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
